description.en: Paid subscription tier — €10.99/mo (Individual), Family, Duo, Student plans. ~250M paying subscribers (2024). No ads, on-demand mobile, offline downloads, higher bitrate. The money side: covers ~88% of total revenue.
description.zh: 付费订阅档 —— €10.99 / 月(个人版),还有家庭版、双人版、学生版。约 2.5 亿付费订阅(2024 年)。无广告、移动端按需点播、离线下载、更高码率。这是收钱方,贡献约 88% 的总收入。
